calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-30-2026 Continued To Jul-06-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Calvin Bryne for administrator Junette O. Damasco (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

Mr. Bryne reported that he had filed a motion to be relieved as counsel, stating that the administrator has been unresponsive, has not paid bond premiums, and that he has been unable to move the matter forward.

The Court noted that a motion to be relieved as counsel is set for July 6, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 and continued the matter to that date.

The Court ordered the administrator to appear and that an Order to Show Cause re removal of the administrator and why sanctions in the amount of $250 should not be imposed for failure to appear shall issue. The Court directed that the Order to Show Cause be served on U.S. Specialty Insurance Company.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Continued To Mar-30-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-03-2025 Continued To Mar-02-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Calvin Bryne appeared via zoom for Junette Damasco (petitioner).

Council stated they could not find any assets, that they do have a lead from the family regarding assets in this estate, and request a continuance to do their investigation. The matter is continued to March 02, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge:Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Robles. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-04-2025 Continued To Nov-03-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Calvin Byrne for Junette O. Damasco (petitioner).

Mr. Byrne stated that his client is New York, that they have not discovered any assets, and that they may be closing the estate with no assets. The matter is continued to November 3, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
